title: Transcription Run-On Generates Detector Of Regulatory elements (TROGDOR).
author: He, Adam
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: TROGDOR  is an image segmentation model that identifies transcription initiation regions (TIRs) from stranded nascent RNA sequencing data (GRO-seq, PRO-seq, ChRO-seq, mNET-seq, etc.). This torch object is an archive of the model weights, which are primarily distributed via  HuggingFace .
steps_raw: TROGDOR  is an image segmentation model that identifies transcription initiation regions (TIRs) from stranded nascent RNA sequencing data (GRO-seq, PRO-seq, ChRO-seq, mNET-seq, etc.). This torch object is an archive of the model weights, which are primarily distributed via  HuggingFace .
